name: Smoked Turtle Dove Shishkabobs
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap halved fillet dove breasts with bacon.
2. Slice onions and green peppers into large chunks.
3. Assemble skewers by placing sliced onion, a dove breast wrapped in bacon, followed by a sliced green pepper on each one. Repeat until the skewer(s) are full (Onion, Dove & Bacon, Green Pepper, then repeat until full).
4. Lightly brush the skewered items with BBQ sauce using a basting brush.
5. Build a bed of hot coals and add hickory chunks for smoke.
6. Place the skewers on the fire and cook until done. Enjoy.
